description_long: This is a medium-sized, red bottle with a smooth, glossy surface and a tapered neck leading to a small opening at the top. The bottle features a bold, white graphic of a stylized animal, possibly a dragon or lizard, wrapping around its body, giving it a striking and modern appearance. The artwork is most prominent on the front and sides, with the back showing mostly solid red with minimal design. The bottle appears to be made of plastic or glass, with no visible seams or handles, and is likely hollow inside. There are no visible labels, text, or branding elements apart from the graphic. The cap area is simple and integrated, with no distinct closure mechanism visible.
description: A red, glossy bottle with a white stylized animal graphic wrapping around its body and a smooth, tapered neck.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent white animal graphic on the red bottle, with the head and upper body clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the continuation of the white graphic, curving around the bottle's body and showing more of the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays mostly solid red with only small portions of the white graphic visible at the edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the back of the animal graphic, with spiky details and a clean, uninterrupted red surface.
